reason: Verified agent message sending and response verification - agent "QA-20260505-195433-iz01" received message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and responded with "4" within 1 second.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with sidebar containing three agents.
Step 2 - Found and clicked agent "QA-20260505-195433-iz01" in the sidebar — Agent was selected and chat interface loaded showing "Math Basics with QA Agent" session.
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator confirmed agent is "idle", which satisfies the requirement.
Step 4 - Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was typed into the message input field and sent successfully using the Send button.
Step 5 - Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded in 1 second, displaying "4" as the response with "Worked for 1s" timestamp.

Step 6 - Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" on the screen. Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message and agent response side by side.
